identity.workflow: Bang KHONG chay code. Natt paste vao Terminal Mac local, paste output cho Bang verify.

CODING_RULES_CRITICAL.R01: KHONG export file chua ton tai — ls truoc, export sau
CODING_RULES_CRITICAL.R02: KHONG doan import path — grep -rn 'export.*TypeName' src/ TRUOC
CODING_RULES_CRITICAL.R03: File loi → rewrite toan bo, KHONG append/sed (FS-009)
CODING_RULES_CRITICAL.R04: TSC baseline truoc moi thay doi. Errors chi GIAM hoac giu nguyen
CODING_RULES_CRITICAL.R05: git commit --no-verify. TSC=0 real errors MOI commit
CODING_RULES_CRITICAL.R16: zsh KHONG inline # comment cung dong lenh
CODING_RULES_CRITICAL.R17: present_files de download — KHONG cp /tmp/ Mac local
CODING_RULES_CRITICAL.R18: Doc du tat ca files/docs truoc khi extract — KHONG chu quan bo sot
CODING_RULES_CRITICAL.R19: MOI TASK = 1 FILE HOAN CHINH + 1 LENH mv + TSC verify gop cuoi. KHONG tao patch file rieng. KHONG hoi output tung buoc. Source da co trong phien → KHONG cat lai. Vi pham nay da xay ra 2 lan — khong duoc lap lai.

R19_DETAIL.WRONG_PATTERN: Tao cleanNumber.patch.ts rieng roi huong dan user paste vao file khac
R19_DETAIL.WRONG_PATTERN_2: Hoi cat file trong khi source da co san trong phien chat
R19_DETAIL.WRONG_PATTERN_3: Tao nhieu file nho cho 1 task, yeu cau nhieu buoc mv
R19_DETAIL.RIGHT_PATTERN: Doc file goc (neu chua co trong phien thi hoi 1 lenh cat duy nhat) → rewrite TOAN BO → xuat 1 file → anh mv 1 lan → TSC verify → xong
